title: schoutenia ovata
intro: Schoutenia ovata is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia, and is also known as the Australian swamp mallow or swamp mallow. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoutenia ovata include the potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Schoutenia ovata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
